mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{role}, #{isProtected}, #{managerId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{role}, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password_hash = VALUES(password_hash), email = VALUES(email), role = VALUES(role), is_protected = TRUE, created_at = IFNULL(created_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at FROM users WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET manager_id = #{managerId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, role, is_protected, manager_id, created_at FROM users WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE manager_id = #{managerId}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.email, u.role, u.is_protected, u.manager_id, u.created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT manager_id, COUNT(*) as managed_count FROM users WHERE manager_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY manager_id ) counts ON u.id = counts.manager_id WHERE u.role = 'ROLE_SECONDARY_ADMIN' AND (counts.managed_count IS NULL OR counts.managed_count < #{maxGroupSize}) ORDER BY COALESCE(counts.managed_count, 0) ASC
